trajectory.model_output:
<python_code>
import numpy as np

# Get the grasp pose for the red cube
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Approach from 10 cm above to avoid collision
z_approach_distance = 0.10

# Move to the approach point above the grasp pose
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=z_approach_distance)

# Open the gripper before grasping
open_gripper()

# Move down to the actual grasp pose (this performs the insertion motion)
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.0)

# Close the gripper to pick up the red cube
close_gripper()

# Lift the cube by moving upward in Z-axis by 10 cm
lift_position = grasp_position + np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.10])
goto_pose(lift_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.0)
</python_code>
